query:
SELECT
      group_address,
      display_name,
      preview_image_url,
      n_members,
      owner,
      treasury_address,
      service,
      mint_handler,
      redemption_handler,
      registered_at
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_group_explorer_profile
    WHERE 1 = 1
      /*__FILTER_CONDITIONS__*/
